## Checklist

- [ ] `yarn lint:fix` passes
- [ ] `yarn format` passes
- [ ] `npm run gen` has been run and generated files are up to date
- [ ] `yarn test` passes
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where applicable
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented
